title: Wooden Animal Puzzle Set for Toddlers
description: Handcrafted maple wood animal puzzle set with eight chunky pieces sized for small hands. Sanded smooth and finished with food safe beeswax. Great for early shape and color learning play at home.

title: Hand Forged Steel Pastry Cutter
description: Solid forged carbon steel pastry cutter with walnut handle. Balanced weight for clean cuts through pie dough and biscuits. Sharpened by hand and oiled ready for years of Brooklyn kitchen use.

title: Chess Piece Leather Bookmark Set
description: Set of six vegetable tanned leather bookmarks each stamped with a different chess piece silhouette. Waxed edges and satin cord tassels. Presented in a natural cotton pouch ready for gifting.
